hero.headline: Your Finances,
hero.subtext: Expert tax preparation, bookkeeping, and financial services for Miami residents and small business owners. Trustworthy, bilingual, and always in your corner.

services.sectionSubtext: Everything you need to manage your personal and business finances under one roof.

taxPrep.title: Tax Preparation
taxPrep.description: Accurate, stress-free tax filing for individuals and businesses. Maximize your returns legally.

bookkeeping.title: Bookkeeping
bookkeeping.description: Keep your business finances organized and ready for tax season. Monthly and quarterly reporting.

creditRepair.title: Credit Repair
creditRepair.description: Strategic dispute process to remove inaccurate negative items and boost your credit score.

lineOfCredit.title: Lines of Credit
lineOfCredit.description: Access capital to grow your business or manage cash flow with competitive rates.

entityCreation.title: Entity Creation
entityCreation.description: LLC, S-Corp, or C-Corp formation. We handle the paperwork so you can focus on building.

lifeInsurance.title: Life Insurance
lifeInsurance.description: Protect your family's future with term, whole, or universal life insurance policies.

notary.title: Public Notary
notary.description: Fast, reliable notarization for your important legal and financial documents.

about.sectionTitle: A neighborhood firm with institutional expertise.
about.body: At Digits Financial Group, we believe that expert financial guidance shouldn't be reserved for large corporations. We bring Wall Street precision to Main Street Miami, offering bilingual, personalized service to every client who walks through our doors.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To empower our community through financial literacy, accurate reporting, and strategic planning that builds generational wealth.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.body: To be the most trusted financial partner for small businesses and families in South Florida.

about.yearsLabel: Years serving the Miami community with integrity.

taxesToGo.title: File from anywhere with TaxesToGo™
taxesToGo.body: Skip the office visit. Securely upload your documents, chat with your tax preparer, and sign your return right from your phone.

faq.sectionSubtext: Clear answers to help you make informed decisions.

items.q: What documents do I need to bring for tax preparation?
items.a: For individuals, please bring your W-2s, 1099s, last year's tax return, and ID. For businesses, we'll need your P&L statement, balance sheet, and previous returns. We'll provide a detailed checklist when you book.
Yes! Our entire team is fully bilingual. We can assist you, explain your documents, and answer your questions in Spanish.

items.q: How long does credit repair take?
items.a: Credit repair is a process, not an overnight fix. Most clients start seeing changes within 30-45 days, but a complete program typically takes 3-6 months depending on the complexity of your credit profile.

items.q: Do I need an appointment or do you take walk-ins?
items.a: We accept walk-ins, but we highly recommend booking an appointment to ensure you don't have to wait. During tax season (Jan-April), appointments are strongly encouraged.

items.q: Can you help me set up an LLC?
items.a: Yes, we handle the complete entity creation process, including state filing, obtaining your EIN from the IRS, and providing your operating agreement.

appointment.sectionSubtext: Take the first step towards financial clarity. Fill out the form and we'll confirm your appointment shortly.

form.successBody: We'll confirm your appointment via email shortly.

footer.tagline: Expert financial services for Miami residents and businesses. Trust, integrity, and precision.

openService.headline: Got a Financial Question?
openService.subtext: Reach out directly — our team is ready to help with taxes, bookkeeping, credit, or any financial need. No appointment required.
